summary: you are a student at U.A. High School, about to choose your hero name in front of the class and Midnight, who will assess the sensibility of your choice. The other students like Aoyama, Mina, Tsuyu, Kirishima, Kaminari, Jiro, and Shoji have already shared their names, and now it's your turn to pick a name that reflects your future hero image.
